titlestmt.titleproper: Vietnam War Veterans Archives and History Center records7000
titlestmt.author: Compiled by E. Engst

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-21 18:44:45 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Vietnam War Veterans Archives and History Center records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Vietnam War Veterans Archives and History Center

did.physdesc: Minutes, correspondence, grant proposals, survey project responses, clippings, audiotapes, and other materials.
did.abstract: Records include minutes, correspondence, grant proposals, and survey project responses. Files relating to the Cornell phase of the project include correspondence, clippings, and survey forms. Also includes five tape cassettes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Vietnam War Veterans Archives and History Center began in 1978 as a project of the Flower of the Dragon, Inc., a veterans outreach group based in California. One aim of the VWV was to establish a repository for materials donated by Vietnam veterans. The Cornell University Archives became that repository in 1981.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records include minutes, correspondence, grant proposals, and survey project responses. Files relating to the Cornell phase of the project include correspondence, clippings, and survey forms. Also includes five tape cassettes.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Part of the Vietnam War Veterans Archives.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Vietnam War Veterans Archives and History Center records, #7000. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Flower of the Dragon Board Minutes,
Flower of the Dragon Board Reports,
Inventory of Books Purchased or Donated to VWV
Vietnam Veteran Writers Conference Concept Paper
Original Written Outline and Projected Budget
Archival Advisory Board Meeting Tapes ( Sept. 1, 1981 , San Francisco)
First National Advisory Board Meeting Tapes ( June 4, 1980 , Washington, DC)
CVS Board of Directors Reports, Corres.
CVS - Package Sent to Board Members
Army - Military Academy at West Point
NHPRC - Funding Proposal - July 1980 Reviewer's Comments
NHPRC - Funding Proposal - July 1980 Response to Reviewers Comments
Subseries 2. No Materials - No Response Necessary
Subseries 3. Yes Materials - No response Necessary
Subseries 4. Yes Materials/No Donor Follow-Up Necessary
